meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Setup to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your SaaS journey. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to generate high-converting project ideas and build your MVP faster.
content.answer_block: Overcome analysis paralysis by leveraging Claude Code to analyze market gaps. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding, you transform abstract pain points into functional MVP codebases. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea; use AI-driven engineering to validate, build, and deploy revenue-generating SaaS products in record time.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking like a metronome of lost potential. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the hunger to build, but the 'what' remains elusive. The graveyard of SaaS is filled with founders who waited for the perfect idea instead of building the right solution to a real problem.

Today, we shift the paradigm. We aren't just brainstorming; we are using Claude Code as a co-pilot to reverse-engineer market demand. By combining the architectural prowess of Claude with the rapid prototyping capabilities of Antigravity, you will stop chasing ideas and start engineering profitable products.

steps.title: Define Your Niche Market Gap
steps.description: Use Claude to analyze current trending problems in specific micro-SaaS verticals to ensure your idea has built-in demand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current search volume and unmet needs in the 'B2B document automation' niche. Identify three specific pain points that can be solved with a browser-based AI tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Identify 3 high-demand micro-SaaS opportunities in document automation with low competition.'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation for your project, ensuring scalability and clean code structure from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and Supabase integration. Include a folder structure for modular API routes.

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your identified pain point into a functional feature set that solves the user's problem immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function to process user document uploads using LangChain and OpenAI API, handling errors and rate limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Create a secure /api/process endpoint to handle PDF uploads and generate summaries using GPT-4o.'

steps.title: Integrate Authentication and Database
steps.description: Connect your MVP to a database to capture user data, which is the lifeblood of any SaaS startup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Supabase Auth and database schema for user profiles and document history tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm install @supabase/supabase-js' && claude edit 'Configure Supabase client and define migration files for user_data table.'

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Finalize your build and push to production to start gathering real-world user feedback immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the build for Vercel deployment and create a basic landing page to capture email signups for waitlist validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm run build' && claude run 'vercel deploy'

pro_tips: Always use 'claude commit' after every feature milestone to maintain a clean git history for future investors.
Force Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes before moving to the frontend to ensure backend stability.
Use Antigravity to generate mock data for your database, allowing you to test UI states before real users arrive.
Never accept the first code output; use 'claude edit' to iteratively refine prompts for better performance and security.
Focus on shipping a 'Concierge MVP' first—use Claude to automate the backend while you manually handle the edge cases.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, set up an analytics dashboard to track user behavior and iterate your product based on actual usage data rather than intuition.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to turn idle thoughts into profitable assets. Stop consuming information and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
